creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #9)

Thanks for confirmation. 

I haven't looked to tell when glib-2.74.1,2 was first packaged for latest … given the app not crashing for me on CURRENT, I might guess that packages were outdated in your case. 

If you'd like to look at the packaging history, try <https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/builds?jailname=main-amd64&type=package&all=1> (and sort by date).
